case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ALMA ORTEGA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ALMA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-13-2020
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65613172) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200001698) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-20-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-21-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ALMA DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 65613172) AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ALMA
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 65613172) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 65613172) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ALMA $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,546.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
